title: Bijective Tongue Coder v2 - format repair
description: Format-repair round addressing v51 contract collapse (0/106 unparseable_output on bijective_dsl_v1_holdout - all 106 outputs emitted ```language code blocks instead of the well_select(...) / tongue_shift(...) contract grammar). Root cause: v51's training file list excluded bijective_dsl_v1_train.sft.jsonl - the file that carries the contract grammar. This round re-introduces it as PRIMARY contract source (939 rows) and oversamples contract_repair_v2_train via the kernel v5 repair-lane sampler at 4x. Trained from base, not warm-started, because kernel_template.py has no LoRA adapter load path. Boundary: v1_holdout is BURNED (contract_repair_v2 was mined from it); evaluation uses bijective_dsl_v4_holdout (boundary-clean - 0 idx overlap audited).
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE bijective Sacred-Tongue coder. Emit DSL programs in the canonical contract grammar: lead with well_select(<WELL>) and, when crossing tongues, tongue_shift(<SRC> -> <DST>). Wells include IDENTIFIED, MULTILINE, TRANSLATED, TRANSLATED_ALL, ALIGNED, GOVERNANCE, EDIT_ALL_BODY, EDIT_LOOP_BODY. Tongues are the six Sacred Tongues KO/AV/RU/CA/UM/DR. Code blocks come AFTER the contract header, never instead of it.

contract_eval.notes: v5 kernel lever - in-training contract-grammar accuracy on the eval set. Read by kernel_template.py via CFG.contract_eval_enabled / contract_eval_steps.

hub.notes: push_adapter:false until promotion gate clears (executable_accuracy >= 0.50 on bijective_dsl_v4_holdout, stage6_regression no-regression vs base, frozen_perplexity <= base).

frozen_perplexity.notes: Allow up to 10% degradation vs base perplexity since contract grammar focus may slightly elevate ppl on broad eval.

boundary_policy.audit_note: v4_holdout uses dsl_synthesised_from key not source_holdout_idx; idx-based overlap with contract_repair_v2 corpus is 0.

evaluation.notes: Standing rule per discovery_regularization_solves_ppl_not_contract.md - executable promotion gate is required evidence; training metrics alone are not promotion evidence.
